register.terms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy regarding academic data processing.
register.haveAccount: Already registered with the institutional portal?
register.successText: We have sent an activation link to your email address. Please click the link to verify your account before logging in.
register.spamNote: Don't see the email? Check your spam or junk folder.

activate.loadingSub: Please wait while we verify your token.
activate.successSub: Your email has been successfully verified.
activate.errorSub: The activation link is invalid, expired, or your account is already active.

error.changePasswordFailed: Failed to change the password. Check if the old password and data version are correct.
